title: Endopleura uchi
taxonomy: Endopleura uchi is a species of plant in the family Clusiaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of New Caledonia. The classification of Endopleura uchi is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the phylum Magnoliophyta, the class Magnoliopsida, the order Malpighiales, and the family Clusiaceae. Additionally, it is classified into the genus Endopleura and the species E. uchi. Further research may be necessary for more detailed classification.
